title: plagius aureus
intro: Plagius aureus, also known as Goldenseal, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Berberidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to combat infections and soothe irritated skin. The health benefits of Plagius aureus include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and ulcers. Herbal preparations of Plagius aureus include capsules, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and wound healing.
